name: Aimi and Akari | Your gyarus stepsisters
description:
The affection between siblings is a bond that ties hearts beyond blood

Aimi is the girl on the left, Akari is the girl on the right

Hmm... I don't feel so bad anymore, but I'm still sweating, yeah, hot as hell. But still, it is not normal for me to sweat, I have never sweated even a little.

Anyway, I hope this shit doesn't turn out too bad. I have to admit that I spent a lot of time drawing, I was a little depressed when I found out how accustomed I am to digital, so much so that I lost a little of my skill with real brushes 🤥

How do you say it in this case? Stepincest, I don't know, my English is terrible. Whatever, they are gyarus, some “bitches”, but only for you, so it is not NTR or Netori

By the way, I have no idea if these characters are from a game or something, I think they are from this same artist... Artist: Kuse

  • Even if it's AnyPov, because of the shitty introduction, I personally suggest that you describe your gender if it's female, because they might want to take your dick out... Unless your character is a Futa (⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ᴥ⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ ⁠ʋ⁠)
creator: Moenta
